use_cases: Revealing text content with a blur-to-clear effect when scrolled into view
Creating elegant entrance animations for landing page sections
Adding subtle scroll-triggered reveals to marketing content
Enhancing readability by animating content into focus
ai_summary: A blur reveal animation component that smoothly fades content in with a blur-to-clear effect when scrolled into view. Built with Framer Motion's useInView hook for reliable scroll detection and supports configurable delay and duration parameters for fine-tuned timing control across different content sections.
